descriptionShort: Dave Tomlinson and Moncton Hawks prepare for Game 6 of AHL playoff series against Saint John Flames.
descriptionLong: Centre Dave Tomlinson of the Moncton Hawks discusses the team's struggle to score in their American Hockey League Atlantic Division semifinal against the Saint John Flames, who lead 3-2. With Game 6 scheduled for that night at the Coliseum, Tomlinson and coach Rob Laird express confidence that the Hawks' top scorers will break loose and contribute goals to advance the series.

attribution.headline: Tomlinson and Hawks look to ignite offence in Game 6
